title: I Hit $1M ARR in 117 Days. Bootstrapped to $10M. Here's My Playbook | Chatbase, Yasser Elsaid
summary: Yasser Elsaid, founder of Chatbase, shares his bootstrapping strategy that achieved $1M ARR in 117 days and scaled to $10M without external funding. The discussion covers key business decisions including product-led growth, SEO strategy, pricing experiments, churn reduction, and when to raise capital.
